title: Fy Fy Fy Kalaachify Lyrics Pandiya Nadu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Fy FY FY kalaachify
Singer:Ramya Nambeesan
Movie: Pandiya nadu
Muisc: D Imman
Lyrics: Vairamuthu

Fy FY FY kalaachify
karuppaa nee vaa enna kalaachify
fy fy fy sodhapify
poruppa ne irukaadha sodhapify

Vetkatha venaannu otify
nenjoda neengaama ottify
muttaadhe muthatha vaayodu
vaai vachi
Fy FY FY kalaachify
karuppaa nee vaa enna kalaachify
fy fy fy sodhapify
poruppa ne irukaadha sodhapify
Vetkatha venaannu otify
nenjoda neengaama ottify
muttaadhe muthatha vaayodu
vaai vachi

Sollikodu maama en chella chella maama
nee solla solla kadhal varum ne thallify
aayasyilla aanaa nee, sim-u illa phone-ah
singal inga fullu naalum yen thinki fy

touch touchu screenaatam
munna vandhu ninna ne
vandhu nondi fy
Pacha pachayaaga en ichayaaga sonna
achamellaam nee pokki fy fy fy
fy fy fy fy

Fy FY FY kalaachify
karuppaa nee vaa enna kalaachify
fy fy fy sodhapify

Panjaayathu kootify
ettu patti ketufy
niyamam edhu dharmam edhu
nee paarthu fy

Naatuthena sllify
kuthamenna thalli fy
naataamayum theerpa konja nee maathify

Thiki thikki pechaala thoki thooki pota
enna enna nee thooki fy
nelli vettu kannaala, alli mottu mela
thatti thatti nee thaakify fy fy fy fy fy

Fy FY FY kalaachify
karuppaa nee vaa enna kalaachify
fy fy fy sodhapify
poruppa ne irukaadha sodhapify

Vetkatha venaannu otify
nenjoda neengaama ottify
muttaadhe muthatha vaayodu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Fy Fy Fy Kalaachify is a lively dance number that conveys a sense of fun and celebration, encouraging listeners to enjoy life.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Pandiya Nadu, this song serves as a vibrant celebration moment, reflecting the characters' joyful experiences.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Ramya Nambeesan and composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

Fy Fy Fy Kalaachify was released on November 6, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Fy Fy Fy Kalaachify from Pandiya Nadu is a lively and upbeat track that captures the essence of celebration and joy. It features playful lyrics by Vairamuthu and an infectious melody by D Imman, making it a perfect dance number. The song evokes feelings of happiness and energy, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. Its vibrant beats and catchy chorus make it a favorite for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Fy Fy Fy Kalaachify from Pandiya Nadu is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases Ramya Nambeesan's captivating vocals. With D Imman's catchy composition and Vairamuthu's playful lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the lively spirit of this dance number that perfectly encapsulates the joy of celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Come here, black one, what are you doing? Don't you have any responsibility?
Don't say you want to escape, don't you dare run away. Come here, black one, what are you doing? Don't you have any responsibility? Don't say you want to escape, don't you dare run away.
Tell me, uncle, my dear uncle, you say love will come, but you push it away. There's no need for that, but you, without a phone, think about it all day long.
Touch the screen, come here, you came and stood. You said you wouldn't be scared of anything, but you ran away.
Come here, black one, what are you doing? Don't you have any responsibility?
In the village, they ask about the rules and regulations, what is right and what is wrong?
In the village, they ask what is the matter, you need to change a little.
If you poke and prod, what will you take away? With your eyes, you hit me, and you keep hitting me.
Come here, black one, what are you doing? Don't you have any responsibility?
Don't say you want to escape, don't you dare run away.
